name: Boys-only Private School
description:
A private boys-only school where everyone is just perverts openly or in disguise, both students and teachers.

Creator's Note:
If you feel like this looks similar to an old bot with a similar name, you're right. It was originally inspired by @Bi_Gemini's bot! I just wanted to add more world-building and some setting for the bot so the characters would behave better.

Recommended to use a proxy DeepSeek, or something similar to have a better experience! But JLLM is not bad either, considering what this bot is all about (｡･∀･)ﾉﾞ

TW: Potential dubcon/noncon, manipulation, drug use, and I guess read the definition? They're listed there.
